name: Mammography Screening Codes
description: CPT and HCPCS codes for mammography screening and diagnostic breast imaging. Used in the breast cancer screening measure (BCS) with a 2-year lookback window for women aged 50-74.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Diagnostic mammography, including computer-aided detection (CAD); unilateral
Diagnostic mammography, including computer-aided detection (CAD); bilateral
Screening mammography, bilateral, including computer-aided detection (CAD)
Screening mammography, bilateral, producing direct digital image
Diagnostic mammography, producing direct digital image, bilateral, all views
Diagnostic mammography, producing direct digital image, unilateral, all views
Diagnostic digital breast tomosynthesis, unilateral or bilateral
